creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 165208
update to 0.3.3

After over 4 years, a new libp11 was released:
https://github.com/OpenSC/libp11/releases/tag/libp11-0.3.0

MASTER_SITES moved to github (the distfile is not on SF).

Note added patches (new files/ directory):
- the dlopen() check has been submitted (and already merged) upstream https://github.com/OpenSC/libp11/pull/57
- the fix to src/libp11.h has been extraced from https://github.com/OpenSC/libp11/commit/87fa165ed17f1432ca0298083ad1761aed7b3f81 to fix an annoying compiler warning
